name: Gum-Gum Rhino Schneider
effect_text: [Main] Up to 1 of your {Dressrosa} type Characters gains +2000 power during this turn. Then, if you have 10 or more cards in your trash, that card gains [Banish] during this turn.

name: Liberation
effect_text: [Main] If the number of your Characters is at least 2 less than the number of your opponent's Characters, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 6 or less and up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 4 or less.

name: Eustass"Captain"Kid
effect_text: [End of Your Turn] You may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up: Set up to 1 of your {Supernovas} type Characters with a cost of 3 to 8 as active. That Character gains [Blocker] until the end of your opponent's next turn.

name: Inazuma
effect_text: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the total of your and your opponent's Life cards.

name: Emporio.Ivankov

effect_text: [On Play] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Add up to 1 {Supernovas} type Character card from your hand to the top of your Life cards face-up.

name: Caribou

name: Killer

name: Scratchmen Apoo
effect_text: If you have a yellow {Supernovas} type Character other than [Scratchmen Apoo], this Character gains [Blocker].

name: Basil Hawkins
effect_text: [On K.O.] Trash up to 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards.

effect_text: [On Play] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards.

name: Eustass"Captain"Kid
effect_text:

name: Roronoa Zoro

name: ROOM

name: Monkey.D.Luffy
effect_text:
Once per turn, this Character cannot be K.O.'d by your opponent's effects.
[When Attacking] You may place 3 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck in any order: If your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand, your opponent trashes 1 card from their hand.

name: Trafalgar Law
effect_text: [On Play] Reveal up to 1 {Supernovas} type Character card from your hand and add it to the top of your Life cards face-down. Then, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your {Supernovas} type Leader.

name: Koby
effect_text:
Your {SWORD} type Characters can attack Characters on the turn in which they are played.
[Once Per Turn] If your {Navy} type Character with 7000 base power or less would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may place 3 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck in any order instead.

name: Ain
effect_text: [On Play] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1000 power during this turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 0 power or less.

name: Prince Grus
